lines.ja: ネオンサインの欠けた文字を
lines.en: As if to fill in the missing letters of a neon sign,

lines.ja: 寂しい世界ごと抱きしめているなら
lines.en: holding this lonely world in your arms —

lines.ja: 時を超えて 星を巡り 会いにゆくよ
lines.en: I'll cross time, circle the stars, and come meet you

lines.ja: 10年先で忘れられた君を探し
lines.en: to find the you who's been forgotten ten years from now,
to track you down right now,

lines.ja: 不確かな唄を手繰ってきたんだよ
lines.en: I've been reeling in an uncertain song all this time

lines.ja: 響きあう僕らの痛みが
寄り添いあう呪いが溢れて
lines.en: the curse of leaning on each other overflows —

lines.ja: 救われたっていいから
lines.en: if it saves you, that's enough

lines.ja: 掬い上げた悲しさとか虚しさとか
lines.en: Sadness, emptiness, scooped up by the handful —

lines.ja: 捻るみたいに漏らすそれは
lines.en: just slightly, letting it leak out —

lines.ja: 正しくなくて目に視えない
lines.en: it's not right, it can't even be seen

lines.ja: 理由もなくて根拠すらない
lines.en: no reason, no evidence at all

lines.ja: この不正解を信じてみたい
lines.en: I want to try believing in this wrong answer

lines.ja: 名前もない誰かの灯火に
恋い焦がれて迎えに行くから
lines.en: I'll ache with longing and come bring it home

lines.ja: 小指と小指を結ぶような拙くて
巡り会うはずがなかった僕と君で
lines.en: You and me, who were never supposed to meet —
let's go see what lies beyond

lines.ja: 10年先で忘れられた君を探し
lines.en: to find the you who's been forgotten ten years from now,
to track you down right now,

lines.ja: 不確かな唄を手繰ってきたんだよ
lines.en: I've been reeling in an uncertain song all this time

lines.ja: 響きあう僕らの痛みで
寄り添いあう呪いで奏でて
lines.en: play it through our mutual curse,
even if you're not there in a corner
of a world a thousand years from now,

lines.ja: ぎこちなくて優しい目も
